text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, July 14. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading scientific papers late tonight. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: The kitchen sink area has a problem. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Good weekend progress on home projects. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
